name: @vevx/varp
description: Graph-aware project analysis and manifest-driven agent orchestration

scripts.build: bun build src/lib.ts --outdir build --target node --format esm --sourcemap=external --external fast-xml-parser --external zod && bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir build --target node --format esm --sourcemap=external --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external zod && bun build src/cli/cli.ts --outdir dist --target bun
scripts.test: bun run test:strict && bun run test:integration
scripts.test:strict: files=$(find src -name '*.test.ts' ! -name '*.integration.test.ts' ! -name '*.e2e.test.ts'); [ -n "$files" ] && bun test --concurrent --coverage $files || echo 'No strict tests found'
scripts.test:integration: files=$(find src -name '*.integration.test.ts' -o -name '*.e2e.test.ts'); [ -n "$files" ] && bun test --concurrent --coverage --bunfig bunfig.integration.toml --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=test-results.xml $files || echo 'No integration tests found'
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run lint:shell && bun run build
